---
title: "Course Materials"
---

## Data and scripts


[[All course files](coursefiles/coursefiles.zip)]{style="font-size: 1.2rem; background-color: #fff0f3; padding: 1px;	border-radius: 6px; text-align: center;"}


## Slide decks


[Setup and Intros](setup.qmd){.external target="_blank"}

[Brief background](background.qmd){.external target="_blank"}

[Hands-on](hands-on.qmd){.external target="_blank"}

[Extensions and more](extensions.qmd){.external target="_blank"}
